name: Source-Prior-Driven Selective Adaptation for Efficient Diffusion Model Finetuning
summary: arXiv:2607.20913v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Fine-tuning large diffusion models for new domains or styles involves a trade-off: improving target-specific generation often degrades the pretrained...
description: arXiv:2607.20913v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Fine-tuning large diffusion models for new domains or styles involves a trade-off: improving target-specific generation often degrades the pretrained model's broad generative capability. Existing full and parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods typically handle this trade-off only implicitly. In this work, we propose a novel source-prior-driven se...
author: Yi Xiong, Yuan-Yuan Cheng, Xiao-Ming Fu
